chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-21 of 2023 (Qalandar Bux Shaikh Vs. Muhammad Arbab @ Shabeero & others) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on MA No. 149/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 06-03-2023. Mr. Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, advocate for the applicant..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1 & 2. Deferred. 3. The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Applicant u/s 497 Cr.P.C has sought for cancellation bail, which was granted to the private respondents prior to their arrest by learned trial Court, mainly for the reason that they are misusing the such concession. If it is so, then the applicant may seek cancellation of bail of the private respondents by filing such application before learned trial Court; consequently, the instant Crl. Misc. Application being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Nasim /PA
